owner: Category Team (data-agent acting); Product approves, QA verifies

shelf_map.mapping_rationale: Shufersal's fresh/soft white-cheese aisle: cottage (גבינת קוטג'), white cheese / quark (גבינה לבנה / קוורק), labaneh (לבנה), and cream cheese / spreadable cheese (גבינת שמנת / ממרח גבינה). This is the editorial scope of the cheese-spreads category per Stress Test v1 Sec 2.1 — fresh, soft, refrigerated, spreadable or curd-format white cheeses for direct table/spread use.

sub_pools.basis: Sec 2.9 dairy divergence axis (curd set, protein-forward)
Parent baseline of the fresh-cheese category; fat tiers 3/5/9% are variants, not pools (Article II 2.5)
Sec 2.9 dairy divergence axis (strained + live-culture defining)
Sec 2.9 proxies fire cleanly (NOVA 3-4 + high fat); indulgent-spread purpose
Sec 2.8 (D1+D3, cheese D3 <=20g) — excluded from adult pools

explicitly_out_of_scope.item: hard / semi-hard / yellow cheese (גבינה צהובה, קשקבל, גאודה, עמק)
explicitly_out_of_scope.reason: Aged/melting, different matrix and consumption role — separate category (Stress Test Sec 2.2).

explicitly_out_of_scope.item: processed melting slices / triangles (משולשים, פרוסות מותכות, פרוסות צהובות)
explicitly_out_of_scope.reason: NOVA 4 processed-cheese; different shelf logic — out of scope for v1.

explicitly_out_of_scope.item: salty brined cheese (בולגרית, פטה, צפתית, פסטרמה)
explicitly_out_of_scope.reason: Brined/aged sub-family with a very different sodium architecture — separate stress test.

explicitly_out_of_scope.item: yogurt, drinkable yogurt, kefir, מעדנים / sweetened dessert cheese (מעדן גבינה ממותק, גבינה במילוי פירות/שוקולד)
explicitly_out_of_scope.reason: Owned by yogurt_system / maadanim; cheese-spreads must not overlap (TASK-142 corpus rule). Sweetened dessert-cheese routes to maadanim.
Ingredient role, not table spread (Stress Test Sec 2.2).
Constitution Art. II Sec 2.3 absolute restriction (medical/infant nutrition) — not ranked at all.

duplicate_shelf_check: PASS — no other active Bari category claims the white-cheese/spread shelf. maadanim owns the sweetened dairy-dessert aisle (מעדן); yogurt_system owns יוגורט/קפיר; the dessert-cheese boundary is enforced in corpus_filter.json (sweetened/fruit/chocolate-filled cheese routes to maadanim).
